content:
My DB with Postgres + Auth + Realtime are entirely hosted on supabase, as you can see only the egress has crossed beyond it's limit whilst other resources are barely used, i wouldn't mind paying for the additional egress but 25$ for the subscription doesn't sound worth it to me. is there any free alternative or something that bills you only for what's being used ?
https://preview.redd.it/i4m2c6jipj9h1.png?width=1272&format=png&auto=webp&s=a12ee6332a9dc423b4134c1fa373f6b6cf4a5128

  submitted by   /u/Fine-Veterinarian537
[link]   [comments]
